Yo, Javier—chill, I see the issue. The change to aggregate_sentences=False is fine (it's for immediate TTS), but the opener TextFrame is queuing before the pipeline fully starts (STT/TTS warm-up lag), so it drops before hitting TTS. The callback starts before runner.run(task), so frame vanishes. Fixed: Queue opener after pipeline start in the task itself. No more silence—opener blasts on connect.
Quick Rollout (30s)

Kill: pkill -9 -f dumb_ava.py; lsof -ti:9092 | xargs -r kill -9
Update Code: Replace the full main function in dumb_ava.py with this (rest unchanged):
pythonasync def main(contact_name: str = "there", host: str = "0.0.0.0", port: int = 9092):
    logger.info(f"Dumb Ava starting—prompt-box mode, no brain, no repeats. Contact: {contact_name}")

    # VAD for basic speech detection
    vad = SileroVADAnalyzer(params=VADParams(start_secs=0.5, stop_secs=1.5, confidence=0.7))

    # Transport
    transport = AudioSocketTransport(
        host=host, port=port,
        params=AudioSocketParams(audio_out_enabled=True, audio_in_enabled=True, audio_in_passthrough=True, vad_enabled=True, vad_analyzer=vad),
        callbacks=AudioSocketCallbacks(
            on_call_connected=lambda uuid: logger.info(f"✅ Call connected: {uuid}"),
            on_call_disconnected=lambda uuid: logger.info(f"📴 Call ended: {uuid}"),
            on_server_ready=lambda: logger.info(f"💡 Server ready on {host}:{port}—dial to test")
        )
    )

    # STT: Groq
    stt = GroqSTTService(api_key=os.getenv("GROQ_API_KEY"), model="whisper-large-v3-turbo")
    logger.info("✅ Groq Whisper Turbo STT active")

    # TTS: Edge (immediate, no aggregation)
    tts = EdgeTTSService(voice="en-US-AvaMultilingualNeural", rate="+10%", aggregate_sentences=False)
    logger.info("✅ Edge TTS (immediate delivery—no buffering)")

    # Dumb aggregator: Script line reader
    dumb_agg = DumbLineAggregator(SCRIPT_LINES, contact_name)

    # Bot line processor: Bypasses STT for bot TextFrames
    bot_processor = BotLineProcessor()

    # Pipeline: Input → Bot Processor → STT → Dumb Agg → TTS → Output
    pipeline = Pipeline([
        transport.input(),
        bot_processor,  # Snags TextFrames for TTS, passes audio
        stt,
        dumb_agg,
        tts,
        transport.output()
    ])

    # Run—no interruptions
    task = PipelineTask(pipeline, params=PipelineParams(allow_interruptions=False, enable_metrics=False))
    runner = PipelineRunner()

    # Queue opener AFTER pipeline starts (no drop)
    async def queue_opener():
        await asyncio.sleep(3.0)  # Pipeline warm-up
        opening = SCRIPT_LINES[0].replace("{{contactFirstName}}", contact_name)
        logger.info(f"📣 Queuing opener after warm-up: {opening[:50]}...")
        await task.queue_frames([TextFrame(text=opening)])
        logger.info("✅ Opener queued—no drop")

    # Start feeder for opener
    asyncio.create_task(queue_opener())

    await runner.run(task)
